image:image.image:title: Cacio e Pepe
image:image.image:caption: Cacio e pepe on tonnarelli with cracked black pepper and finely grated pecorino romano

image:image.image:title: Carbonara
image:image.image:caption: Spaghetti carbonara with crispy guanciale, pecorino romano, and fresh-cracked black pepper on a white plate

image:image.image:title: Pad Thai
image:image.image:caption: Pad Thai with shrimp, beansprouts, lime wedges, and crushed peanuts on a banana leaf

image:image.image:title: Pho Bo
image:image.image:caption: Vietnamese pho bo with rare beef, brisket, rice noodles, scallions, cilantro, herb plate on the side

image:image.image:title: Pizza Margherita
image:image.image:caption: Neapolitan Margherita pizza with leopard-spotted crust, San Marzano tomato, buffalo mozzarella, fresh basil

image:image.image:title: Shoyu Ramen
image:image.image:caption: Tokyo shoyu ramen with chashu pork, ajitama egg halves, menma, scallion, and nori

image:image.image:title: Tacos al Pastor
image:image.image:caption: Tacos al pastor on doubled corn tortillas with charred pineapple, white onion, and cilantro, lime wedges on the side
